meaning: <西>n.瓜希拉舞曲(一种古巴农民舞舞曲)
examples: Colombia -The Wayuu normative system, applied by the Pütchipü'üi (palabrero ) - The Wayuu community inhabits the Guajira Peninsula straddling Colombia and Venezuela.
The Wayuu community inhabits the Guajira Peninsula straddling Colombia and Venezuela.
One such example is presented by the Wayuu Guajira Indians who represent the largest indigenous group in Venezuela and Colombia (about 135, 000 in Colombia and 170, 000 in Venezuela).
